title: lomatium sandbergii
intro: Lomatium sandbergii, also known as Sandberg's lomatium, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and is a member of the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, and its roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lomatium sandbergii include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as colds and flu. Lomatium sandbergii is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be made into a salve or ointment for topical use.
